caribbean.headline: Turks Caicos Faces Strong Winds
caribbean.paragraph: Turks and Caicos is experiencing 23 kt winds with 5.8 ft wave heights and a 54% rain probability, while nearby Martinique has relatively calm conditions with 10 kt winds. I expect the strong winds and moderate waves in Turks and Caicos to impact marine activities, but no significant warnings are required at this time.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Sees Gentle Winds
mediterranean.paragraph: Haifa is experiencing a 25% rain probability with winds at 11 kt and wave heights reaching 5.5 ft, while Mykonos is seeing stronger winds at 22 kt. I note that both locations are below the thresholds for any marine wind warnings, with Haifa having less than 10% of the conditions necessary for a Small Craft Advisory and Mykonos falling short of a Gale Warning.
